texto: Maybe He'll get what he deserves. Maybe Not. Maybe I'll never find it in my heart to forgive him. And maybe there's nothing wrong with that,either. All those maybes swimming around my head make me think that "maybe" could just be another word for hope.
explicacao: Citação de Amber Smith sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Maybe He'll get what he deserves. Maybe Not. Maybe I'll never find it in my heart to forgive him.…” articula reflexao, forgiveness, pain em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como pain e real.

frase_original: Maybe He'll get what he deserves. Maybe Not. Maybe I'll never find it in my heart to forgive him. And maybe there's nothing wrong with that,either. All those maybes swimming around my head make me think that "maybe" could just be another word for hope.

texto: I feel these forbidden thoughts creep in sometimes without warning. Slow thoughts that always start quietly, like whispers you're not even sure you're hearing. And then they get louder and louder until they become every sound in the entire world. Thoughts that can't be undone. Would anyone care? Would anyone even fucking notice? What if one day I just wasn't here anymore? What if one day it all just stopped? What if? What if? What if?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Amber Smith: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I feel these forbidden thoughts creep in sometimes without warning.
